example-compute-birds.title: Compute Birds
example-compute-birds.description: Thousands of GPU-flocked birds, wings flapping, fleeing your cursor.

example-raging-sea.title: Raging Sea
example-raging-sea.description: A choppy neon ocean of GPU-displaced waves, after Bruno Simon's Three.js Journey lesson.

example-ball-cluster.title: Ball Cluster
example-ball-cluster.description: 1000 balls collide into a cluster on the GPU; the cursor shoves them around.

example-voxels.title: Voxels
example-voxels.description: A GPU-culled voxel world drawn from packed quads in one indirect pass. Click to dig.

example-volume.title: Volume
example-volume.description: A lit volumetric cloud, raymarched from a 3D texture. Drag to orbit.

example-cube-camera.title: Cube Camera
example-cube-camera.description: A chrome sphere reflecting its surroundings in realtime.

example-point-lights.title: Point Lights
example-point-lights.description: Colored point lights orbiting spheres; lighting you write yourself.

example-indirect-batched.title: Indirect Batched
example-indirect-batched.description: CPU-driven indirect draws from one merged geometry.

example-compute-texture.title: Compute Texture
example-compute-texture.description: A compute shader writes a texture; a render pass samples it.

example-indirect-compute.title: Indirect Compute
example-indirect-compute.description: A compute shader drives the draw count, culling on the GPU.

example-hello-world.title: Hello World
example-hello-world.description: A single spinning, lit cube: the simplest scene.

example-instanced-mesh.title: Instanced Mesh
example-instanced-mesh.description: 30 instanced boxes with per-instance transforms and colors.

example-instancing-storage-buffer.title: Instancing with Storage Buffer
example-instancing-storage-buffer.description: Instanced boxes driven by a storage buffer.

example-storage.title: Storage Buffers
example-storage.description: Inline vs. name-based storage buffer patterns.

example-interleaved.title: Interleaved Vertex Buffers
example-interleaved.description: Interleaved vertex attributes packed into one buffer.

example-line.title: Line
example-line.description: Fixed-width screen-space lines, static and animated.

example-video-texture.title: Video Texture
example-video-texture.description: A video played live onto a spinning cube.

example-array-texture.title: Array Texture Flipbook
example-array-texture.description: A flipbook animation from a 2D array texture.

example-mipmaps.title: Mipmaps
example-mipmaps.description: Mipmaps + anisotropy vs. none, side by side.

example-render-to-texture.title: Render to Texture
example-render-to-texture.description: Render one scene into a texture, sample it in another.

example-mrt.title: MRT (Multiple Render Targets)
example-mrt.description: Render to 4 targets at once, composited side by side.

example-shadow-map.title: Shadow Map
example-shadow-map.description: Two-pass shadow mapping with a depth texture.

example-cubemap.title: Cube Texture Skybox
example-cubemap.description: A cube-texture skybox viewed from inside.

example-discard.title: Discard
example-discard.description: An animated dither dissolve via Discard().

example-fxaa.title: FXAA
example-fxaa.description: FXAA anti-aliasing on a high-contrast cube.

example-viewports.title: Viewports + Scissor
example-viewports.description: A grid of independent 3D views composited into one canvas via setViewport / setScissor / autoClear.

example-transform-controls.title: Transform Controls
example-transform-controls.description: A translate/rotate/scale gizmo. T/R/S to switch modes.
